name: 15q21_TJP1_SD
description: 15q13-q21 transitional SD region between the proximal HERC2/CHRNA7 paralog field and the FBN1 region. Contains TJP1, B2M, and PAQR5 with small directly-oriented SDs (5-20 kb at 93-97% identity) flanking each gene; sparse but high-identity LCRs occasionally mediate rare CNVs.

architecture.internal_structure: 5-20 kb SD pairs at 93-97% identity flanking TJP1 and B2M; LINE-rich intervening segments.
